citation_and_locator: Law, Yan Kei Ann. 2004. Sentence-final focus particles in Cantonese. PhD dissertation, University College London; UCL Discovery eprint 10101610, open-access full text
what_it_supports: Restrictive `zaa3` and additive `tim1`; proposed shared lower CP particle class; clausal/root/embedded scope; association with identificational focus; topic, quantifier, adverbial, question, right-dislocation, and particle-order interactions; explicit divergent-speaker judgments.
limit: Formal dissertation relies on author and limited informant judgments; it does not supply representative sampling, corpus frequencies, acoustic validation, or modern dialect-stratified replication, and some `tim1` judgments are explicitly variable.
